message:
refactor(codegen): Migrate all 2-block files to withInlineBlock

- _bisect_mod.zig (bisect_left, bisect_right)
- keyword_mod.zig (iskeyword, issoftkeyword)
- uuid_mod.zig (uuid4, uuid1)
- hmac_mod.zig (new, digest)
- html_mod.zig (escape, unescape)
- textwrap_mod.zig (wrap, fill)
- _functools_mod.zig (reduce, cmp_to_key)
- functools_mod.zig (partial, reduce)
- copyreg_mod.zig (newobj, newobj_ex)
- _pickle_mod.zig (dumps, loads)
- pickle_mod.zig (dump, load)
- zipfile_mod.zig (ZipFile, is_zipfile)
- _elementtree_mod.zig (Element, SubElement)
- _random_mod.zig (random, getrandbits)
- _signal_mod.zig (signal, alarm)
- binascii_mod.zig (hexlify, unhexlify)
- _pydatetime_mod.zig (date, datetime)
- sysconfig_mod.zig (get_config_var, get_path)
- builtins_mod.zig (sideEffect, isinstance)

~97 blocks now migrated. Next: 3-6 block files.
